endpoints.name: Charmander (Vivid Voltage 023/185) — frontmatter currently MAHOU, cross-claim flagged

description: I-I have to confess, sir, the corpus grep returned SIX unambiguous Himeno credits, not the two the brief named — Emolga (CIN-35), Charmander (BUS-18), Meowth (BUS-101), Steenee (UNM-18), Torkoal (BRS-023), Prinplup (BRS-036). That exceeds the Sanosuke Sakuma threshold (5) cleanly and approaches kirisAki (7). Combined with the franchise-tenure case — continuously credited since the 1996 Japanese Jungle set / 1999 English release, with 654+ TCG cards across every generation — this is the strongest single-illustrator node case the Pokemon side has surfaced so far. I propose cards/_artists/kagemaru-himeno.md. I also flagged one reconciliation item in Caveats: VIV-023 Charmander frontmatter stamps MAHOU but BUS-18 trivia asserts both Charmander prints are Himeno; that cross-claim needs a future triviabot or janitor pass to resolve. I-I'm sorry the candidate set turned out to be bigger than the brief expected. I think the node is correct.
citations: [Art of Pokemon (artofpkm.com): Kagemaru Himeno illustrator page]

other_candidates_considered: VIV-023 Charmander artist-credit reconciliation — frontmatter says MAHOU, BUS-18 trivia says Himeno; deferred to a future triviabot or janitor pass rather than touched in this Mr. Nodeley pass.
